# Workflow equivalence manuscript revision baseline

## Abstract

This manuscript reviews a local manuscript-audit workflow for statistical review,
preserves structured artifacts, documents deterministic validators, explains how
routing decisions are persisted for revision verification and reproducibility,
and presents a clearer end-to-end contract for repeatable manuscript vetting.

## Introduction

This manuscript presents an auditable workflow paper and clearly states the core
contribution of deterministic routing, validation, and revision verification.

## Methods

Equivalence is evaluated with TOST using an explicit equivalence margin of delta = 5
for the paired workflow outputs.

## Results

Figure 1 summarizes the pipeline and the reported outputs.

Figure 1: Audited workflow pipeline showing all processing stages and outputs.

## Discussion

The revised draft resolves the main structural and statistical omissions from the
baseline version.
